zh.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub於1580年出生。她於大約1596年與Peter Menges Sr.在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1679年10月18日在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾享年99歲，埋葬在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub于1580年出生。她于大约1596年与Peter Menges Sr.在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1679年10月18日在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾享年99岁，埋葬在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Staub
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German stoup, German Staub ‘dust’, a nickname for a miller. The Jewish name may also be artificial.

variants.name: Stoup
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Staub   or   Staup  .
Dutch: variant of   Stoop   1.

variants.name: Stauble
meanings: South German (Stäuble): diminutive of Staub .

variants.name: Stob
meanings: South German (Stöb) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Staub .

variants.name: Staubs
meanings: Possibly an altered form of   Staub  .

variants.name: Steeb
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Heinz.
South German: nickname from Middle High German steb(e) ‘dust’, probably denoting a miller. Compare Staub .

variants.name: Stoff
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Otto.
North German: metonymic occupational name for a miller, from Middle Low German stof ‘dust’. Compare Staub 1.
German: from a pet form of the personal name Christoph (see Christopher ).

variants.name: Steib
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Clovis, Lucien, Celestine, Firmin, Jacques, Julien, Pierre, Prudent, Vernice.
German: dialect variant of   Staub  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Staup
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Staub  .

variants.name: Stauber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Baruch, Berish, Hersh, Nachman, Yidel, Zalmen.  German Horst, Wolf, Erwin, Markus, Ulrich, Wolfgang.
German (also Stäuber) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a miller, from Staub , with the addition of the German agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Greek. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margarethe
meanings: from Greek. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub was born in 1580. She married Peter Menges Sr. about 1596, in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 October 1679, in Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire, at the age of 99, and was buried in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub est née en 1580. Elle a épousé Peter Menges Sr. environ 1596, à Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1679, à Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub wurde 1580 geboren. Sie hat um 1596 in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland Peter Menges Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1679 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich und wurde in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub è nata il nel 1580. Lei sposato Peter Menges Sr. circa 1596, nel Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1679, nel Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolta a Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staubは1580年に生まれた。約1596年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスモッサウタルヒルテルスクリンジェンでPeter Menges Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1679年10月18日にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチヘブスタhルで99歳で死去し，デウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.Beerfelden, Erbach, Starkenburg, Hesse,: 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든

ko.Ober-Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwald: 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 힐터스클링
ko.Hebstahl, Erbach, Starkenburg, Hesse, Ge: 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈
ko.Of Hiltersklingen,Starkenburg,Hessen,Ger: 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 힐터스클링
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub(은)는 1580년 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1596년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 모소탤 힐터스클링에서 Peter Menges Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1679년 10월 18일 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub nasceu em 1580. Ela casou-se com Peter Menges Sr. aproximadamente 1596, em Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1679, em Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão, com 99 anos, e foi sepultada em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub родилась в 1580 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Menges Sr. около 1596 г. в местности хилтирсклинген, моссауталь, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1679 г. в местности хебстахл, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Staub nació en 1580. Se casó con Peter Menges Sr. aproximadamente 1596, en Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1679, en Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultada en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich.
